_doc: Options for the collect-context collector. news_limit caps items per coin (MCP tool max 20); throttle_seconds spaces MCP calls politely. Coin symbols are seeded from the collect-vault cache (vaults[].symbol, LP pairs split on '-') and filtered to stablecoin_whitelist (case-insensitive) so pair vaults' non-stable partners and protocol-wrapped vault tokens are dropped. Override at runtime: --extra-symbols A,B adds coins on request; --all-symbols bypasses the whitelist entirely. Requires the CMC_PRO_API_KEY env var or ~/.versusos/.env.
